content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: journal_entry_red_flags, benfords_law_execution_flaws, timeline_causal_linkage, saas_metric_forensic_indicators, quantified_financial_impact, data_source_authentication, cross_validation_analytics, statistical_sampling_methodology, memo_executive_synthesis, professional_skepticism_documentation, internal_control_deficiency_linkage, comparative_period_analysis
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
